query: True Detective Season 5 official cast confirmed HBO 2025

{"query":"True Detective Season 5 official cast confirmed HBO 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1728,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.tvinsider.com/1175987/true-detective-season-5-premiere-date-trailer-cast-location-plot-details/","title":"'True Detective' Season 5: Cast, Premiere Date, Location, and More","content":"The series will be helmed by Season 4 showrunner Issa López, who previously signed an overall deal with HBO.
In an interview with the exec, Orsi said Season 5 will be “set in New York, in Jamaica Bay.” She added, “Issa has a lot to say, not unlike she did with Night Country.
No official casting has been announced at this time, but preliminary casting was reportedly underway, according to a report by Deadline in February 2025.
According to the report, Cage is being eyed to play Henry Logan, a New York detective.
As mentioned above, López is helming Season 5, fresh off the success of her Season 4 entry, Night Country.
Regarding Season 5’s behind-the-scenes team, Orsi told Deadline, “I’m really excited about it.
López’s role was previously teased when HBO renewed the anthology series amid Season 4’s run.
At the time, López said, “From conception to release, Night Country has been the most beautiful collaboration and adventure of my entire creative life.
According to Orsi, Season 5 will launch in 2027, with an exact premiere date and month yet to be announced."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2025/02/true-detective-season-5-setting-revealed-begin-production-1236286442/","title":"'True Detective' Season 5 Setting Revealed; Show Preps For Production","content":"It also is moving to another state, HBO’s Head of Drama Series and Film Francesca Orsi told Deadline during an interview at The White Lotus Season 3 premiere while discussing the network’s upcoming slate.
Filming on the new season is slated to begin in the coming months, with casting in preliminary stages.
Honestly, I can’t wait for this to go.
It’s all about casting and getting this ready.”"},{"url":"https://www.yahoo.com/entertainment/tv/articles/true-detective-nicolas-cage-talks-011020165.html","title":"‘True Detective’ Season 5 Premiere, Setting & Cast Revealed","content":"Nicolas Cage is reportedly under consideration for a leading role in Season 5, which is set to begin filming in 2026, although no official casting announcements have been made by HBO.
Issa Lopez, who helmed Season 4, will be back to lead Season 5, with the premiere set for 2027, although specific plot details have not yet been revealed.
And while the latest update is a confirmation about the upcoming location setting of Season 5, other details have trickled out over the past several months, as the possible lead of Season 5 was teased in August 2025.
HBO and HBO Max content Chairman and CEO Casey Bloys offered confirmation about the Season 5 setting when we asked him about it during the HBO slate presentation on November 20.
"We're still working with Issa on the story, which she does have set in New York, but no updates on it," Bloys stated.
"That said, it's a new story, new characters, everything," López added, but promised, "There's a little bit of joy for the fans of Night Country.""},{"url":"https://www.productionlist.com/production/true-detective-season-5","title":"True Detective (Season 5) | Production List","content":"True Detective (Season 5)
